rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson, Axel Olsson
rule_metadata.title: Facebook CDN suspicious attachment download

rules.rule_text:
title: Facebook CDN suspicious attachment download
id: bde8d06b-3fd5-4022-9c13-95f0af23350a
description: Facebook CDN has been misused to host malicious rar and zip archives,
  if bytes_in > 1000 bytes its  likely to be a rar or zip archive download.
status: experimental
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson, Axel Olsson
date: '2024-01-18'
modified: '2024-01-19'
references:
- https://labs.guard.io/mrtonyscam-botnet-of-facebook-users-launch-high-intent-messenger-phishing-attack-on-business-3182cfb12f4d
- https://cyble.com/blog/new-editbot-stealer-spreads-via-social-media-messages/
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    url|startswith: https://cdn.fbsbx.com/v/
    c-uri|endswith:
    - .zip
    - .rar
    sc-status: '200'
  filter:
  - cs-referer: ''
  - cs-referer|contains:
    - facebook.com
    - zoomsphere.com
  condition: selection and not filter
falsepositives:
- Legitimate archive downloads
- Look at the filename and decide if it appears suspicious. Similar files can often
  be found by searching virustotal like this "name:<filename>"
level: medium
tags:
- attack.initial_access
